text.message: youd think id have the best road production
no brick or wood in sight
I HAVENT GOTTEN A WOOD YET
are u guys teamed or what
no one has stolen from orange yet
man are u seeing the game?
relax blue im only first place until u take army next turn
og might do a road and win
red u had to do roads

u have 4 points and 5 down devs and 1 knight away from army
ofc i steal from u because u might win
but you keep stealing from me anyways
like u and orange are buddies
both keep soloing me even though it risks ur win to not go after each other
glad you guys pulled it off
red why did u make roads
can one of u just trade the other one the win and wrap it up already
i just wanna play against people good enough to win without teaming
get me into a new game asap
i wont use my knight blue u can have army
blue u have to do roads
who do we want to win orange or blue
gg, keep practicing and youll soon be winning without needing a teammate
